text: {"claims":[{"statement":"Remuneration and appointment rank offered will be commensurate with the successful applicants’ academic qualification, professional experience and current current position.","entailment":"The quoted sentence directly states that remuneration and rank are linked to qualifications, experience, and current position, supporting the claim.","population":"","intervention":"","comparator":"","outcome":"","timeframe":"","quantifiers":"","modality":"descriptive"},{"statement":"Qualified candidates should apply the position online at experience, publications and academic research outline etc.","claimType":"methodological","quote":"Qualified candidates should apply the position online at the University’s careers site professional experience, publications and academic research outline etc.","entailment":"The quoted instruction outlines the required application procedure, supporting the methodological claim about how candidates must apply.","population":"","intervention":"","comparator":"","outcome":"","timeframe":"","quantifiers":"","modality":"descriptive"},{"statement":"The research group investigates innovative digital interventions for mental disorders and psychological distress.","claimType":"empirical","quote":"The research group investigates innovative digital interventions for mental aspects of digital interventions that the research examines, supporting the claim.","population":"","intervention":"","comparator":"","outcome":"acceptance, effectiveness, mechanisms of action","timeframe":"","quantifiers":"","modality":"descriptive"},{"statement":"The working group actively promotes open and reproducible science (e.g., through pre-registration and the sharing of
